name: Carbon peeling fume extractor
shortDescription: Professional fume extractor for laser and carbon peeling treatments. HEPA and activated carbon filter system, built-in LED lighting.
description:
Professional fume extractor for laser and carbon peeling treatments.

Efficiently removes smoke and contaminants generated during treatments with an effective filter system, ensuring a clean and healthy working environment.

The built-in white LED lamp assists precise work even in low-light conditions.
metaTitle: Carbon peeling fume extractor | With LED lighting
metaDescription: Professional fume extractor for laser treatments. HEPA and activated carbon filter, built-in LED lighting, CE certification. Universal mounting.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the fume extractor? We're happy to help!

final.headline: Interested in the Carbon fume extractor?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation, or order directly!

faq.question: Why is a fume extractor necessary for laser treatments?
faq.answer: During carbon peeling or any laser treatment, smoke, airborne particles, odors, and even toxic substances can be generated from vaporized skin or pigment material. The fume extractor efficiently removes these, ensuring the health of both the operator and the client.

faq.question: What filter system does it use?
faq.answer: The device features a combined HEPA and activated carbon filter system that effectively filters microparticles and unpleasant odors.

faq.question: Which devices can it be used with?
faq.answer: The fume extractor can be used with all laser devices, including ND:YAG lasers, diode lasers, and equipment used for carbon peeling treatments.
